meanings.definition: a short ad in a newspaper or magazine (usually in small print) and appearing along with other ads of the same type
arrange or order by classes or categories
examples: How would you classify these pottery shards--are they prehistoric?

meanings.definition: declare unavailable, as for security reasons
assign to a class or kind
examples: People argue about how to relegate certain mushrooms

meanings.definition: official classification of information or documents; withheld from general circulation
examples: thousands of classified documents have now been declassified
